column1: # wolfBoot firmware component inventory  (manually audited dependency surface)
#   wolfBoot is C with no package manager
#   the signature-based component identification that Black Duck's KnowledgeBase
#   does. So the vendored crypto libraries (git submodules) are tracked by hand
#   here. This is the authoritative component list that feeds the CycloneDX SBOM
#   In a real Black Duck pipeline this list would be produced automatically by
#   Detect's signature + binary scanning. Here it is the honest manual analogue.
# Pinned commits were read from `git submodule status` of wolfBoot v2.8.0.

column8: Secure bootloader (root firmware project under analysis)
Crypto + TLS library; wolfCrypt provides firmware signing/verification (ECDSA/RSA/ED25519/SHA)
